Priority Service

Expedited Car Shipping

When time is critical, our expedited auto transport service gets your vehicle moving fast. We prioritize your shipment with guaranteed pickup within 24–48 hours and faster transit through direct routing.

Whether it's a last-minute relocation, a military PCS deadline, or a vehicle auction with a tight pickup window — our rush shipping service ensures your car arrives when you need it, not when it's convenient for the carrier.

Why Choose Expedited Shipping?

Priority carrier assignment — fastest pickup times

Guaranteed pickup within 24–48 hours

Dedicated single-vehicle or small-load carriers

Ideal for urgent relocations & time-sensitive moves

Open or enclosed trailer options available

Real-time updates throughout expedited transit

Frequently Asked Questions

How fast is expedited car shipping?

With expedited service, your vehicle is typically picked up within 24–48 hours of booking (compared to 3–7 days for standard). Transit times are also shorter since carriers take more direct routes with fewer stops. Cross-country expedited shipments usually arrive in 3–5 days.

How much more does expedited shipping cost?

Expedited auto transport typically costs 20–50% more than standard shipping due to priority scheduling and dedicated carrier assignment. The exact premium depends on your route, vehicle type, and how quickly you need pickup. Contact us for a personalized quote.

When should I choose expedited transport?

Expedited shipping is ideal for urgent relocations, last-minute military PCS moves, time-sensitive dealership deliveries, vehicles purchased at auction with tight pickup deadlines, or anytime you simply can't wait for standard scheduling.

Need It Shipped Fast?

Get a free expedited shipping quote — priority pickup within 24–48 hours.

We Ship To All 50 States

Rastaman Logistics offers reliable auto transport to and from every contiguous US state. Click any state to learn more about routes, pricing, and transit times.
